lines: Ready... set... aim! Can you reach that target, {player}?
It's not about how hard you throw, but where you aim.
Keep your eye on the goal, {player}!
no_quest_line: Your aim is getting sharper every day, {player}!
quest_offer_line: I need some help hitting these distant targets. Are you a good aim, {player}?
quest_progress_line: Almost there! Adjust your aim just a little bit, {player}!
quest_complete_line: Bullseye! You've got a sharp eye and a steady hand, {player}.
